violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation in the walk in freezer is being caught into a container.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. -Doing vegetable prep in the wash sink. Need to use the sanitizer compartment as it is air gapped.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
